description:
This Safer Neighbourhood area covers Mackworth / Morley Estate. It belongs to the Derby North policing section.
 
Mackworth estate is a residential area located within the Mackworth Ward of the Derby North policing area. Mackworth housing estate was built around 1950 as social housing by the City Council of the day.
